meta.title: Double Inference Speed with AWQ Quantization
meta.description:
*Runpod Affiliate Link* https://tinyurl.com/yjxbdc9w
*One Click Runpod Template* https://runpod.io/gsc?template=6e9yxszwne&ref=jmfkcdio

*Private GitHub Repo Access* https://buy.stripe.com/9AQ28UcWh4PF1ckeV9
- Detailed API/server setup instructions.
- Guides for RunPod and EC2/Ubuntu instances.
- Inference recipes, including long context length.
- Forum for questions/support.

*Underlying tools/links:*
- Colab notebook: https://tinyurl.com/bde69se7
- AWQ paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2306.00978.pdf
- GPTQ paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2210.17323.pdf
- llm-awq on GitHub: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/llm-awq
- text-generation-inference: https://github.com/huggingface/text-generation-inference
- chat-ui: https://github.com/huggingface/chat-ui
- The Bloke's models: https://huggingface.co/TheBloke/Llama-2-7b-Chat-AWQ

6:49 How to run AWQ in Google Colab
8:50 How does AWQ quantization work?
9:29 How does quantization work for language models?
16:13 How does GPTQ work?
21:52 Pro tips
